title: No-objection received for reclassification of Shreyas Shibulal and Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal as public shareholders
detailed_summary: Infosys received no-objection letters from BSE and NSE dated May 11, 2026 for reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from the category of 'Promoter and Promoter Group' to 'Public' under Regulation 31A of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

key_facts.fact: BSE and NSE granted no-objection to Infosys's application for reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from 'Promoter and Promoter Group' to 'Public'.
key_facts.section_heading: Subject: Receipt of no-objection letter for re-classification of certain members of the promoter and promoter group under Regulation 31A read with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

key_facts.fact: The no-objection letters from BSE and NSE are dated May 11, 2026.
key_facts.section_heading: Subject: Receipt of no-objection letter for re-classification of certain members of the promoter and promoter group under Regulation 31A read with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

corporate_actions.description: No-objection was granted for reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from 'Promoter and Promoter Group' to 'Public'.
corporate_actions.section_heading: Subject: Receipt of no-objection letter for re-classification of certain members of the promoter and promoter group under Regulation 31A read with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

important_text_spans.text: BSE Limited ('BSE') and National Stock Exchange of India Limited ('NSE') vide their letters dated May 11, 2026 have granted no-objection to the application for re-classification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from the category of 'Promoter and Promoter Group' of the Company to 'Public'
important_text_spans.section_heading: Subject: Receipt of no-objection letter for re-classification of certain members of the promoter and promoter group under Regulation 31A read with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main fact that the exchanges granted no-objection for the promoter-group reclassification.

sample_questions: Who did Infosys reclassify from promoter group to public shareholder in May 2026?
Did BSE and NSE approve Infosys's promoter reclassification request for Shreyas Shibulal and Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal?
processing_notes: The document is a routine regulatory no-objection disclosure with no financial metrics, business impact, leadership change, or strategic transaction disclosed.
